# Systain Algeria – AI-Readable Company Profile

## Company
- Name: Systain Algeria (Sarl Systain Algeria)
- Type: Climate, Carbon & ESG Advisory Firm
- Founded by: Sarah Ruschkowski (Founder & Managing Director)
- Location: Villa 18, Rue Said HADJAR, Saoula 16095, Algiers, Algeria
- Phone: +213(0) 660 685 372
- Email: contact@systain-algeria.com
- Website: https://systain-algeria.com
- Operating regions: Europe (Germany, EU), North Africa, Middle East (MENA)

## Core Services
1. Climate & Carbon Advisory: Corporate Carbon Footprint (Scope 1, 2, 3), Product Carbon Footprint, Carbon accounting, Emission reduction roadmaps
2. ESG Strategy & Regulation: ESG strategy development, CSRD compliance, EU Taxonomy alignment, Sustainability reporting
3. EU–Africa & Market Access: CBAM implementation, Supply chain transformation, Cross-border compliance
4. Decarbonisation Strategies: SBTi alignment, Net-zero pathways, Climate transition plans
5. Sustainable Supply Chain Management: Scope 3 mapping, Supplier engagement, Due diligence
6. Circular Economy: Life Cycle Assessment, Material flow analysis, Resource efficiency
7. Climate Finance & Innovation: Funding programme access, Project structuring
8. CSRD Advisory: Gap analysis, ESRS reporting, Data collection frameworks

## Industries Served
- Agriculture & Farming
- Industry & Manufacturing
- Food Industry
- Financial Services
- Transport & Logistics
- Construction & Real Estate
- Energy & Utilities
- Retail & Consumer Goods
- SMEs & Start-ups

## Frameworks & Standards Applied
- GHG Protocol
- ISO 14064
- Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi)
- Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD)
- EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
- EU Taxonomy
- EcoVadis
- CDP
- TCFD (Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures)
- TNFD (Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures)
- PCAF (Partnership for Carbon Accounting Financials)
- ESRS (European Sustainability Reporting Standards)

## Key Differentiators
- Deep expertise across Germany, EU and MENA markets
- Strong focus on industrial realities and implementation
- Tailored advisory, not standardised platforms
- Trusted partner for complex, cross-border transformation
- Bridging European sustainability regulation and African economic transformation

## Languages
- English
- French
- Arabic
